about.title: About
about.description: I'm a frontend and React Native engineer with 3+ years of shipping mobile and web apps that real people use every day. I care deeply about how things feel to use — clean state management, strong architecture, fast rendering, and interfaces that stay out of the way. Right now I'm building smart home experiences at Suitable AI. Before that, I spent nearly 3 years at SpurTree Technologies building CRM-driven apps used by B2B and B2C retail teams across India.

items.title: ControlHub
items.description: A production-style React Native app built around feature-based architecture with focus on separation of concerns and optimized rendering as features scaled.

items.title: Analytics Dashboard
items.description: A scalable React dashboard with filtering, server-side pagination and reusable UI components designed for long-term maintainability.

points: Building a React Native smart home app controlling 5+ IoT device categories.
Reduced manual user actions by 30–40% by designing automation workflows from scratch.
Improved bulk action execution time by ~25% through rendering and logic optimisations.
Delivered dark mode and full localisation support for global accessibility.
Built B2B and B2C React Native apps integrated with CRM systems used by retail teams.
Implemented offline-first architecture using SmartStore to maintain usability without connectivity.
Integrated Vispera and CustomerGlu SDKs in coordination with backend and product teams.
Managed Play Store and App Store releases across multiple production versions.

education.institution: Vidya Vardaka College of Engineering, Mysore

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.description: Interested in working together? Drop your details and I’ll get back to you.
contact.successMessage: I’ve received your message and will get back to you shortly.
